title: Webmaster
summary: Webmaster at CCN TV6 and Trinidad Express Newspaper, handling content management, ePaper production, social media, and video editing for the 'Beyond the Tape' segment. Semi-remote.
achievements: Maintained and updated website content across both CCN TV6 and Trinidad Express platforms
Produced ePaper editions and managed digital publication workflows
Ran social media strategy and day-to-day channel management
Handled video editing for the 'Beyond the Tape' news segment
